name: Eddie Murphy
blurb: Leather-suited supernova of the arena era.
bio: Eddie Murphy was stand-up's leather-clad rock star, exploding out of SNL at 19 and filling arenas by 22. Delirious and Raw set the template, the swagger, scale, and confessional bravado, that every arena special since has chased.

timeline.ev: Raw becomes the top-grossing stand-up film ever

accolades: Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (2015)
Raw is the highest-grossing stand-up concert film ever
Golden Globe winner and Academy Award nominee

films.note: Axel Foley made him a movie star.
A late-career triumph as Rudy Ray Moore.
